raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 5 is forcing thousands of independent contractors to become formal employees of a business.",
    "AB 5 has been a boon to union leaders but horrible for California's economy, workers, and businesses.",
    "AB 5 is particularly harmful to less traditional businesses, particularly for those owned by women and persons of color.",
    "ACA 19 would, if approved by the voters, overturn AB 5 and allow Californians to have maximum flexibility in deciding what type of work environment best serves their needs.",
    "Individuals have the right to pursue a chosen business or profession free from arbitrary or excessive government interference.",
    "State law shall not prevent an employer from agreeing to an employee's request for a flexible work schedule."
  ]
}
```
